title: PWA App Compatibility — Mobile & Installable App Support

requirements.summary: Configure PWA manifest for installable app support with standalone display, correct URLs, and maskable icons
acceptanceCriteria: manifest.json has display: standalone
start_url and scope are correctly set for ICP-hosted app
Icons include at least 192x192 and 512x512 entries with purpose: maskable
App installs via browser 'Add to Home Screen' on Android and iOS

file_operations.description: Update manifest.json to set display to 'standalone', configure start_url and scope for ICP deployment, set orientation to 'portrait', and add icon entries for the generated 192x192 and 512x512 maskable icons located at frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-192.dim_192x192.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-512.dim_512x512.png with purpose: 'maskable any'.

requirements.summary: Update service worker to pre-cache app shell, handle offline navigation, and activate immediately with skipWaiting
acceptanceCriteria: Service worker cache version is updated
App shell assets are pre-cached on install
Navigating offline shows the cached app shell rather than a browser error
New service worker activates immediately using skipWaiting and clients.claim()

file_operations.description: Bump the CACHE_VERSION constant to trigger a new service worker activation. Update the CACHE_ASSETS array to pre-cache all critical app shell assets including index.html, main.tsx bundle, index.css, and the generated icon files at frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-192.dim_192x192.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-512.dim_512x512.png. Add self.skipWaiting() in the install event and self.clients.claim() in the activate event to ensure immediate activation. Enhance the fetch handler to gracefully serve cached app shell (index.html) for navigation requests when offline instead of failing.

requirements.summary: Ensure mobile-responsive layout with touch-friendly bottom nav, no-zoom inputs, and no horizontal overflow on small screens
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom nav items have at least 44px height/tap area
Input fields use font-size of at least 16px to prevent iOS zoom
No horizontal overflow on screens 320px wide
All sections (FitnessSection, FinanceSection) are scrollable and usable on mobile viewports

file_operations.description: Update the bottom navigation bar styling to ensure each nav item has a minimum tap target height of 44px and adequate padding for touch-friendly interaction. Add responsive container classes to prevent horizontal overflow on small screens (min-width 320px). Ensure the main content area accounts for the fixed bottom nav height and allows proper scrolling on mobile viewports.

Review all form inputs and ensure they have a font-size of at least 16px to prevent iOS automatic zoom on focus. Add responsive padding and spacing classes to prevent horizontal overflow on 320px wide screens. Ensure all tabs and scrollable content areas work correctly on mobile viewports.

Review all form inputs and ensure they have a font-size of at least 16px to prevent iOS automatic zoom on focus. Add responsive padding and spacing classes to prevent horizontal overflow on 320px wide screens. Ensure all tabs and scrollable content areas work correctly on mobile viewports.

Add global CSS rules to enforce a minimum 16px font-size on all input, select, and textarea elements to prevent iOS zoom on focus. Add responsive utility classes or base styles to ensure no element causes horizontal overflow on viewports as narrow as 320px.

requirements.summary: Register service worker in App.tsx only on HTTPS/localhost with graceful error handling
acceptanceCriteria: Service worker registration is guarded by 'serviceWorker' in navigator check
Registration only proceeds on HTTPS or localhost
Registration errors are caught and logged without breaking the app load
App functions normally even if service worker is unavailable

file_operations.description: Update the service worker registration logic to check for 'serviceWorker' in navigator and verify the environment is either HTTPS or localhost before attempting registration. Wrap the registration call in a try-catch block to handle errors gracefully, logging failures to the console without disrupting app functionality. Ensure the app loads and functions normally even if service worker registration fails or is unavailable.

requirements.summary: Add Apple PWA meta tags to index.html for iOS installability
acceptanceCriteria: apple-mobile-web-app-capable meta tag is present and set to 'yes'
apple-mobile-web-app-title is set to 'FinFit'
apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style is set to 'black-translucent'
apple-touch-icon link tag references a valid icon file

file_operations.description: Add the following Apple PWA meta tags to the head section: apple-mobile-web-app-capable set to 'yes', apple-mobile-web-app-title set to 'FinFit', and apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style set to 'black-translucent'. Add an apple-touch-icon link tag pointing to the generated icon at frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-512.dim_512x512.png to support iOS home screen installation.
